distinctive_elements: Stage-select music with multiple themed areas
Ending theme (26 seconds documented, additional 26 seconds unused)
influences: Mega Man series (Mega Man 5 engine base)

notes: Documentation does not provide tempo, key signatures, chord progressions, or detailed SFX characteristics per stage. Music data is limited to composer credit (Yasuaki Fujita) and general style reference. The Cutting Room Floor mentions unused music (ending theme truncation) but provides no technical audio parameters. No area-specific or per-track musical analysis is available in provided sources.
